title: Advisor With $340 Million in Assets Joins Ameriprise to Elevate Service and Advice Offering for Clients
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Private Wealth Advisor Kathy Hobart CIMA®, AIF® recently joined the independent channel of Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) from Raymond James with $340 million in client assets. Hobart joined an established Ameriprise practice, Heritage Wealth Advisors in Mercer Island, Wash., which is led by Ameriprise Private Wealth Advisor Erin Scannell CFP®. Heritage Wealth Advisors was established in 2000 and manages more than $3 billion in client assets. The team has 1.

title: Two Advisor Teams With More Than $760 Million in Assets Join Ameriprise for Support and Depth of Resources
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Two teams of financial advisors recently joined the independent channel of Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) with more than $760 million in combined client assets. Allan McClure, CFP®, CFA® and Daniel Bass, RICP® were previously with Synovus Securities, Inc. in Birmingham, Alabama where they managed $422 million in client assets. title: Ameriprise Financial Services (AMP) Tops Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Ameriprise Financial Services (AMP) came out with quarterly earnings of $7.44 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $7.29 per share. This compares to earnings of $5.81 per share a year ago.

title: Ameriprise Financial Announces Additional $3.5 Billion Share Repurchase Authorization; Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Directors of Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) has authorized an additional $3.5 billion for the repurchase of shares of its common stock through September 30, 2025. As of July 25, 2023, the company had approximately $0.5 billion available from its January 2022 authorization, which is available through March 31, 2024. The company intends to fund share repurchases through existing excess capital, future free cash flow generation and other customary.

title: Ameriprise Attracts Advisor with $250 Million in Assets to its Financial Institutions Channel for Enhanced Capabilities to Serve Clients
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) announced today that financial advisor Amanda Hale has moved her $250-million practice to the firm from PNC Investments in Port Arthur, Texas. title: Ameriprise Financial Announces Schedule for Second Quarter 2023 Investor Conference Call
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) plans to announce its second quarter financial results on Wednesday, July 26, 2023 after the close of the New York Stock Exchange. The company will host a conference call to discuss the results on Thursday, July 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. (ET). title: Three Advisors with $400 Million in Assets Move Their Practices to Ameriprise for Technology and Financial Planning Capabilities
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) recently added three financial advisors to its independent channel with more than $400 million in combined client assets. title: 84 Ameriprise Financial Advisors Named to AdvisorHub's “Advisors to Watch” Rankings
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today Ameriprise Financial (NYSE: AMP) announced that 84 of the firm's financial advisors were named to AdvisorHub's second annual “Advisors to Watch” lists. AdvisorHub, a publication covering news and trends in the wealth management industry, recognized the leading financial advisors on six lists: 100 Advisors to Watch Over $1 Billion; 100 Advisors to Watch Under $1 Billion; 200 Fast Growing Advisors to Watch; 50 Next Gen Advisors to Watch; 100 Solo Advisors to Wa.
